dominant_failure_mechanism: The scheduled qualitative release did not produce robust hurdle-adjusted five-session SPY range compression versus frozen prior-only neutral controls; failed gates: positive_frequency.

option_stage.risk_semantics: planning width bound only; no credit or option marks observed

predeclared_geometry.bootstrap: one-sided 90% lower bound, resample whole release years

control.event_exclusion_scope: all source-covered official Beige Book dates

predeclared_geometry.endpoint: maximum high / minimum low - 1 over five completed sessions
predeclared_geometry.entry: next completed regular session open after official publication date
predeclared_geometry.exit: fifth session close including entry session
predeclared_geometry.regime: prior completed HV20 <= 0.30 and abs trailing 60-session return <= 0.12

search_information: Official prior-known Beige Book publication dates plus official calendar-time corroboration, train-only range endpoint, prior-only neutral-regime controls, sealed final 40%, and zero option pricing.
